title: Artifacts crafting
description: Implements crafting recipes for Artifacts mod
body:
# OVERVIEW
This mod adds crafting recipes to every wearable item of the Artifacts mod for having an easier way to get Artifacts items, rather than finding them.

The RPG version contains more complex recipes for who wants an harder challenge.

## WARNING

This mod needs Artifact mod for working ([https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts))

I also recommend installing JEI, EMI or REI mod.

Enjoy yourself ;)
